study.guestBanner: Progress won't be saved. <link>Sign up free to track it</link>.
study.thinkPrompt: Think of your answer, then tap below.
study.keyboardHint: Space: reveal · 1: needs practice · 2: got it
study.resumeTitle: You left off at question {n} of {total}
study.resumeDesc: Pick up where you left off, or start fresh with a new shuffle.
study.anyAnswer: Any of these answers is acceptable
study.variableAnswer: This answer changes with the current officeholder.
study.zipPrompt: Enter your ZIP code to see your actual answer.
study.zipLookupError: Could not look up your officials. Try again.
study.sessionSummary: You marked yourself confident on {confident} of {total} questions.
study.signUpPrompt: <link>Sign up free</link> to save your progress and track it over time.

test.instruction: Say your answer out loud. Then mark yourself.

history.title: History
history.emptyDesc: Complete your first mock test to see results here.

dashboard.progressText: {studied} of {total} questions studied so far. Keep going.
dashboard.allQuestionsDesc: Practice the full set in random order.
dashboard.starredDesc: Study the 20 starred questions for the 65/20 special consideration.
dashboard.needsPracticeDesc: Re-drill the questions you marked as needs more practice.
dashboard.onboardingStep1: Read the question and say your answer out loud — just like the real interview.
dashboard.onboardingStep2: Tap 'Show answer' to reveal the correct answer and mark yourself.
dashboard.onboardingStep3: Your progress saves automatically. Come back anytime to continue.

progress.title: 128 questions
progress.resetDesc: This clears your study history for all 128 questions. You can't undo this.

billing.heading: Unlock full access
billing.desc: Everything you need to pass your civics test — practice as many times as you like.

feedback.titleSessionEnd: Quick question — how's the study experience so far?
feedback.placeholderMockTest: Was the mock test a fair reflection of the real exam? (optional)
feedback.placeholderAll128: You've seen all 128 — what's missing or confusing? (optional)

share.text: I scored {score}/{total} on the US civics test — {result}. Think you can beat me? Try it free:

settings.title: Settings
settings.zipDesc: Used to show your local senators, governor, and representative.
settings.zipLookupError: Could not look up your officials. Try again.
settings.dailyGoalDesc: How many questions do you want to study each day?
settings.fontSizeDesc: Adjust the text size across the app.

interview.setDatePrompt: Know your interview date? Add it to see your readiness countdown.
interview.pastInterview: Interview date has passed — how did it go?

readiness.starting: You're just getting started — every question you study brings you closer.
readiness.foundation: Good foundation! Focus on the categories you haven't touched yet.
readiness.momentum: You're building momentum — half the questions are solid.
readiness.strong: Strong progress! Push through the remaining questions.
readiness.almost: Almost there — just a few questions left to master.
readiness.ready: You're ready. Confidence is high across all 128 questions.
readiness.interview-soon: Interview is close — prioritize your weakest questions now.
